text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for Mihono Bourbon's debut.
Nervousness is a foreign concept to her, but she
offers to become nervous if it's required.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I send her off with instructions to run as hard as
she can, knowing she'll carry out my orders like a
well-calibrated machine.
